scripts.vercel-build: prisma generate --schema=server/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma migrate deploy --schema=server/prisma/schema.prisma && cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.db:setup: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && node prisma/seed.js
